customers_say: Customers find this smart lock to be of excellent quality, with professional installation and reliable performance. They appreciate its sleek appearance, ease of use with good app interface, and consider it a great value. They like the features, with one customer highlighting the multiple access options for self and family, and another mentioning the password masking functionality.

reviews.author: Swetha
reviews.title: Good product
reviews.body: Good product. Using it since a week now, no problem. Has good locking features and easy to use app. Opening the door with the app is definitely an advantage. Only con is it doesn't have video talking options

reviews.author: chandran
reviews.title: Perfect front door lock.perfect installation
reviews.body: The lock pro is a perfect solution for front door.very competent installation.very easy to use, yet quite safe.met our requirement to the full

reviews.author: Niranjan Reddy Nare
reviews.title: Best Lock
reviews.body: Excellent Service by UC, Bhim technician arrived is a professional guy and made a neat installation
